channel.title: Data Provenance on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Data Provenance on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001): Basic AI Concepts Related to Cybersecurity
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "AI Concepts" , "Machine Learning" , "Deep Learning" , "Large Language Models" , "Generative AI" , "Data Management" , "AI Security" , "CY0-001" , "Artificial Intelligence"
item.description: Master basic AI concepts for the CompTIA SecAI+ CY0-001 exam. Learn machine learning, deep learning, transformers, language models, prompting, model optimization, data management, and grounding techniques.
